paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.organization: BigCode (co-stewarded by ServiceNow Research, Hugging Face, Northeastern University, Carnegie Mellon University, etc.)
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a 15.5B-parameter open-access Code LLM with advanced architectural features—8K token context length, infilling capabilities via Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM), and Multi-Query Attention (MQA)—designed for broad multilingual code support and responsible development practices
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Stack v1.2 (1 trillion tokens from 80+ programming languages, GitHub repos, issues, commits, Jupyter notebooks)
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual code generation, infilling, large-batch inference, cross-language code comprehension
raw_extraction.license: Open RAIL-M License (royalty-free access with use restrictions)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing open-access, multilingual, high-performance Code LLMs with ethical considerations around copyright, privacy, and transparency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned on a 35B-token subset of Python-specific code for improved domain specialization
raw_extraction.extension: Multi-Query Attention (MQA) enables efficient large-batch inference, while Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) provides infilling capabilities
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.organization: BigCode (co-stewarded by ServiceNow Research, Hugging Face, Northeastern University, Carnegie Mellon University, etc.)
raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tunes StarCoderBase on 35B Python tokens to specialize in Python code while retaining strong multilingual capabilities, achieving superior Python-focused performance without sacrificing cross-language proficiency. Includes enhanced PII redaction and attribution tracing tools
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: The Stack v1.2 (1T tokens) + additional 35B Python tokens from fine-tuning
raw_extraction.application: Python code generation, cross-language code completion, responsible deployment with attribution and PII protection
raw_extraction.research_problem: Specialized multilingual code generation with domain-specific fine-tuning and ethical safeguards
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling (base: 1T tokens; fine-tuned on 35B Python tokens)
raw_extraction.extension: Enhanced PII redaction pipeline (fine-tuned StarEncoder model) and attribution tracing via lightweight membership checks + BM25 indexing
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.innovation: StarCoderBase fine-tuned on 35B Python tokens for specialized code comprehension, achieving state-of-the-art performance on Python benchmarks (HumanEval, MBPP, DS-1000) while maintaining the original 15.5B parameter architecture
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Curated dataset (1T tokens) + 35B tokens of Python-specific code from GitHub repositories
raw_extraction.application: Advanced Python code generation, debugging, and domain-specific task adaptation
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with FIM transformations
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on 7,878+ annotated Python code samples (7,878 training + 4,000 test split)
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.innovation: StarCoder represents the largest open-source code language model to date, combining unified pre-training for both program understanding and generation. Its architecture leverages a transformer-based encoder-decoder design optimized for code, significantly advancing the state-of-the-art in code generation and comprehension
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Subset of The Stack v1.2 (filtered for permissively licensed source code)
raw_extraction.application: Automated code completion, debugging assistance, low-code application development, and educational tools for programming
raw_extraction.license: OpenRAIL-M (includes use restrictions for harmful content)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing advanced code language models for improved program understanding and generation
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

raw_extraction.organization: GitHub/Codescape (co-authored by Meta, Microsoft, and others)
raw_extraction.innovation: StarCoder represents a foundational code language model trained on over 150GB of diverse source code across 15 programming languages, leveraging a hybrid architecture combining transformer encoders and decoders for improved code generation and understanding. Its training incorporates extensive cross-lingual and multi-task learning approaches to enhance robustness
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Stack (3TB permissively licensed source code) + The Stack (3TB curated code corpus) + additional datasets including Pile, CodeSearchNet, CodeXGLUE, Hugging Face datasets
raw_extraction.application: Programming assistance, code completion, debugging, automated testing, and general-purpose code generation across diverse programming languages
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-quality code generation and understanding using large language models
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked code modeling (similar to BLOOM but focused on code)
raw_extraction.paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!
